title: oxytropis campestris subsp. tatrae
intro: Oxytropis campestris subsp. tatrae, also known as the Tatra mountain milkvetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The Tatra mountain milkvetch is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have numerous health benefits, including reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy digestive system.
